claims: Implemented sanitizeString helper in AliceOrchestrator.cpp to strip UTF-16 BOM and non-ASCII chars.
Updated readFileContents to use sanitization, preventing json parse errors on corrupted logs.
Integrated file wiping (std::filesystem::remove) in TilesetMicroTest.cpp to clear corrupted logs before execution.
Verified build and native execution of TilesetMicroTest.exe (Result: 1.0).
optimization_metrics: Sanitization is O(n), single pass over buffer. Replaced std::vector with std::string::reserve in sanitizeString.
